lines.speaker: Swensen the Navigator
lines.text: Hello outerlander. This is my home, I would be grateful if you would leave.

lines.speaker: Swensen the Navigator
lines.text: I am sorry outerlander, I will not offer you hospitality until my Chieftain has vouched for your honesty. This is our way.

lines.speaker: Swensen the Navigator
lines.text: Greetings to you [brother/sister] [Fremennik name]! How fare you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am fine thanks Swensen. How are you doing?
